Sun City Takeover — Group Planning

FonCity 2026

6 PAX  ·  6–9 NOVEMBER 2026
The Trip

Sun City Takeover

Get in, girls — we're going to Sun City Takeover and we are gonna have a ball in that joint! We'll start off the girls trip with a kick ass road trip, then from there expect a weekend full of music, great people, fun, and poolside vibes set against the resort's iconic backdrop. We'll be heading down as a group of six hotties from 6–9 November 2026.

Overview

How This Works

This page is your central reference for the trip — the spending budget broken down per person, how it splits across monthly instalments, and where we stand on the LayUp room package. Two things to keep separate throughout: the spending budget (shuttle, drinks, food, snacks) and the LayUp room package — they're paid into different accounts on different schedules.

Where We're Staying

Room Details

We're staying at the Cascades Hotel, Sun City's 5-star property set among gardens, waterfalls, and lagoons — a short walk from the Valley of Waves and Sun Central.

We've booked 3x Luxury Twin Rooms, each sleeping 2 people in twin beds. Each room includes breakfast each morning, 2x weekend passes to all Sun City Takeover events, and full access to resort facilities. Check-in is from 14h00, check-out by 11h00.
Twin Beds En-Suite Bathroom Air Conditioning Free WiFi Minibar 24-Hour Room Service Garden Views

LayUp Room Package

Where We Stand

Each remaining instalment of R9,499.03 works out to R1,583.17 per person (rounded to R1,590) — paid in July, August, and September. These room payments have been running consistently since April, so they're not new. What's new from the end of June is that the spending budget instalments begin overlapping with them. On the 4-month spending plan, that's ~R2,026 per person for spending alone in June, rising to ~R3,609 per person per month in July through September once the ~R1,590 room instalment is added. On the 3-month spending plan, spending alone runs ~R2,701 per person per month, rising to ~R4,291 per person per month in July through September once the room instalment is included.
Banking Details

Where to Send Your Money

Two separate accounts depending on what you're paying for. Make sure your reference is exact — every single time.

LayUp / Room Payments
Account holder TK MTHEMBU
Bank CAPITEC
Account number 1773041930
Branch code 470010
Reference format
Name_Month
e.g. Rati_July  ·  Shoki_August
Spending Budget Payments
Account holder BS MPAI
Bank INVESTEC
Account number 70001422527
Branch code 580105
Reference format
501001001_Name
e.g. 501001001_Rati  ·  501001001_Kaede
Use the exact reference format shown above every time you make a payment. Incorrect or missing references make it difficult to reconcile who has paid what.
Payments ⌄
Coming Soon
Live Payment Tracker

A full payment dashboard is on its way. Here's what you'll be able to do once it's live:

  • Track every contribution — see exactly what's been paid toward both the LayUp room package and the spending budget, updated in real time as payments come in.
  • Per-person progress — a breakdown for each of the 6 of us showing how much we've paid and what's still outstanding across both payment streams.
  • Full payment history — a running log of every contribution made, by who, when, and for which month.

Two separate trackers — one for the LayUp room instalments (due 28 July, 28 August, 28 September) and one for the spending budget instalments — so there's never any confusion about which pot you're paying into.
